_comment: Weekly auto-publish queue. The GitHub Action publishes queue[0] each Monday, then removes it. Newest-intended-first is NOT required; order = publish order (top publishes first). To add a post: write _drafts/<slug>.body.txt and prepend/append an entry here. Fields: slug, title, description, og_title, og_desc, og_alt, tag (visible), cat (filter key: partnerships|growth|leadgen|operations|automation), read, summary (listing card).

queue.title: How to Define Your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)
queue.description: Your ideal customer profile is the decision everything else depends on. A practical way to define an ICP that sharpens targeting, messaging and every channel you run.

queue.summary: Your ideal customer profile is the decision everything else depends on. How to define an ICP that sharpens targeting, messaging and every channel you run.

queue.title: Sales and Marketing Alignment: How to Actually Get It
queue.description: Sales and marketing misalignment quietly kills pipeline. A practical guide to shared goals, a common definition of a good lead, and the operating rhythm that keeps both teams pulling together.

queue.og_desc: Misalignment quietly kills pipeline. Shared goals, one definition of a good lead, and the rhythm that keeps both teams together.

queue.title: Demand Generation: A Practical Playbook for Pipeline
queue.description: Demand generation creates the market that lead generation captures. A practical playbook for building a demand engine that makes your whole funnel cheaper and warmer over time.
queue.og_title: Demand Generation: A Practical Playbook for Pipeline
queue.og_desc: Create the market before you capture it — a practical playbook for a demand engine that makes the whole funnel cheaper.
queue.summary: Demand generation creates the market that lead generation captures. A practical playbook for a demand engine that makes your whole funnel cheaper and warmer over time.

queue.title: LinkedIn Lead Generation: A System for Social Selling
queue.description: LinkedIn lead generation done right is social selling — earning attention and trust at scale, then converting it deliberately. A system for getting replies instead of blocks.
queue.og_title: LinkedIn Lead Generation: A System for Social Selling
queue.og_desc: Social selling that earns replies, not blocks — a system for turning LinkedIn into your best lead-gen channel.
queue.summary: LinkedIn lead generation done right is social selling — earning attention and trust at scale, then converting it deliberately. A system for getting replies instead of blocks.

queue.title: AI Lead Generation: What Actually Moves Pipeline
queue.description: AI lead generation is leverage on a system, not a substitute for one. Where AI genuinely moves pipeline, where it quietly hurts you, and how to adopt it without becoming the spam.
